hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] || exit 0; bin=./node_modules/.bin; msg=""; case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx) out=$("$bin/eslint" --fix "$f" 2>&1); "$bin/prettier" --write "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; echo "$out" | grep -qE 'problem|error|warning' && msg="$out" ;; *.json|*.css|*.html) "$bin/prettier" --write "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true ;; esac; if [ -n "$msg" ]; then jq -nc --arg m "$msg" --arg f "$f" '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PostToolUse",additionalContext:("ESLint reported unfixed issues in " + $f + ":\n" + $m)}}'; fi; }
